description: OpenCode YOLO permission policy with layered defenses. rm guard plugin + deny rule double-layered; bash restricted to explicit command whitelist; file tools scoped to workspace.
notes: OpenCode permissions are glob/command gates, not a filesystem sandbox.
Last matching rule wins — insertion order matters.
rm guard plugin (rm-outside-workspace-guard.js) hard-blocks external rm; permission deny rule is second defense line.
read/glob/grep/edit all unrestricted (glob/command gates cannot do filesystem sandboxing; real safety from rm-guard plugin + git-commit-gate + human review).
bash whitelist replaces wildcard '*': only git, npm, node, python3, rg are explicitly allowed.
To re-enable full YOLO, replace bash allowlist with { "*": "allow" }.
